creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 193241
svn diff for databases/pgworksheet

databases/pgworksheet is currently marked BROKEN/DEPRECATED
because of a problem with a dependent port:
databases/py-pyPgSQL
which I have fixed ( bug #228119 ).
The attached svn diff (patch) UNBREAKS databases/pgworksheet
but depends on bug #228119

CHANGES included in this svn diff:

 o removes DEPRECATED
 o removes EXPIRATION_DATE

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
